title: A New Circumscription of Saccharum and the Saccharinae: A Paradigm Shift in Our Understanding of the Origins of Sugarcane.
author: Lloyd Evans, Dyfed
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Datasets to accompany the Sugar Tech paper 'A New Circumscription of Saccharum and the Saccharinae: A Paradigm Shift in Our Understanding of the Origins of Sugarcane.' The data include assemblies of chloroplasts and 45s ribosomal RNA from third party data. For phylogenetics there are multiple sequence alignments for whole chloroplasts and 45s ribosomal RNA as well as example phylogenies (in Newick Format) for both. Files available are: 

 third-party-45s.zip  zipfile of the directory third-party-45s containing 45s rRNA regions assembled from third party data 

 third-party-cp-seqs.zip  zipfile of the directory third-party-seqs containing whole chloroplasts assembled from third party data 

 chloroplast-final-align.fas multi-fasta alignment of all the chloroplasts studied in the paper 

 cp-phylo.tre phylogram in New Hampshire format generated from the chloroplast alignment 

 45s-final-align.fas  alignment of all the 45s rRNA regions studied in the paper 

 45s-phylo.tre phylogram in New Hampshire format generated from the 45s rRNA alignment
